Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by .
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Puletele Fonoti, Alex Winterstein, Regina Winterstein, Evely Winterstein and Hanschen Winterstein are present. DEFENDANT LOLE FONTI IS NOT PRESENT.
Attorney Courtney Pasen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwok, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB 09, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
